Kamino launched Whitelisted Reserves, a smart contract-enforced allocation control restricting vault deployments to approved markets, enhancing security. The Elemental USDC Optimizer vault generated $197K interest on $11M+ supplied across Prime, Huma, and xStocks at 6.73% APY. Stablecoin yields reach 8.12% USDG and 5.40% USDC, outperforming benchmarks.

The vault positioning lacks urgency or novelty that would drive shares, instead reading as standard DeFi yield farming marketing that appeals only to users already hunting for this specific product type.
